text: Open Source Intel General Jennie Carignan, Canada’s Chief of the Defence Staff: “The world has changed. We have to get ready for large-scale conflicts, more conventional, so we need a different military to do that and different capability.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043444283714220374/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：加拿大国防参谋长珍妮·卡里尼昂将军：“世界已经变了。我们必须为大规模、更常规的冲突做好准备，因此我们需要一支不同的军队来做到这一点，并具备不同的能力。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043444283714220374/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Canada's Defense Chief: "The world has changed... we have to get ready for large-scale conflicts." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043443507776397614/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iran FM Aragachi: “In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned Good will begets good will. Enmity begets enmity.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗外长阿拉格齐：“在47年来最高级别的密集会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当距离‘伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录’仅一步之遥时，我们却遭遇了极限施压、改变目标和封锁。零教训，善意换不来善意。敌意只会招致敌意。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel 10AM EST. Strait of Hormuz. Hello A-10s, stay safe and happy hunting! Video: @CobraEmergency https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043442274554531921/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国东部时间上午10点。霍尔木兹海峡。你好，A-10攻击机，注意安全，狩猎愉快！视频：@CobraEmergency https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043442274554531921/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 “Hungary will once again be a strong ally within the European Union and NATO,” Péter Magyar said. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043441145229791345/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel NOW 🔴 IRAN: WILL NOT ACCEPT ANY U.S. BLOCKADE OF THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ BREAKING 🔴 US CENTCOM: Forces will start blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports on Monday, 10 AM ET. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：现在 🔴 伊朗：绝不接受美国对霍尔木兹海峡的任何封锁。突发 🔴 美国中央司令部：部队将于周一美国东部时间上午10点开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的航运交通。 - 开源情报 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned Good will begets good will. Enmity begets enmity. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗外长阿拉格齐：在47年来最高级别的密集会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们却遭遇了极限施压、改变目标和封锁。零教训，善意换不来善意。敌意只会招致敌意。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇭🇺 Hungarian PM elect Peter Magyar on serving Hungary: “I will serve as long as it benefits the nation. I will do so as long as I can. God bless Hungary, God bless every good person.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇭🇺 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔谈服务匈牙利：“只要对国家有利，我就会服务。只要我能做到，我就会去做。上帝保佑匈牙利，上帝保佑每一个善良的人。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Péter Magyar: We will renew and put on a strong foundation, and if possible, expand, the cooperation of the Visegrád Four. In this spirit, my first trip will be to Poland, to strengthen the thousand-year-old Polish-Hungarian friendship. My second trip will lead to Vienna, and the third to Brussels, so that we can bring home the EU funds that the Hungarian people are entitled to. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：彼得·马扎尔：我们将更新并夯实维谢格拉德集团的合作基础，并尽可能扩大合作。本着这种精神，我的第一次出访将前往波兰，以加强千年波匈友谊。我的第二次出访将前往维也纳，第三次前往布鲁塞尔，以便我们能带回匈牙利人民应得的欧盟资金。 推文

text: Open Source Intel I’ll remind you, today the IRGC “Navy” warned the U.S. any ships entering the strait will receive a “very harsh” response BREAKING 🔴 US CENTCOM: Forces will start blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports on Monday, 10 AM ET. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：我提醒你们，今天伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队“海军”警告美国，任何进入海峡的船只都将受到“非常严厉”的回应。突发 🔴 美国中央司令部：部队将于周一美国东部时间上午10点开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的航运交通。 - 开源情报 推文

text_zh: 开源情报：匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔在取得压倒性选举胜利后表示：“我们已经取代了欧尔班政权，解放了匈牙利。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043438084772057214/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Péter Magyar: TISZA not only won this election, but every sign points towards having a strong two-thirds majority in the new National Assembly. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043437337644876212/video/1 tweet

text: OSINTtechnical The US military has announced a blockade of Iranian ports starting at 10:00 am ET (5:30 pm Tehran time) tomorrow. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043436961826840803/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国军方宣布将于明天美国东部时间上午10:00（德黑兰时间下午5:30）开始封锁伊朗港口。 https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2043436961826840803/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) U.S. Central Command officially announces the beginning of blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports. The blockade is set to start on April 13 from 2:00 PM UTC. Freedom of navigation for vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports won't be affected, per statement. http://x.com/i/article/2043411331861057536 - U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）美国中央司令部正式宣布开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的航运交通。封锁定于4月13日世界协调时下午2:00开始。根据声明，通过霍尔木兹海峡往返非伊朗港口的船只的航行自由将不受影响。 http://x.com/i/article/2043411331861057536 - 美国中央司令部 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has announced that beginning on Monday, April 13 at 10:00AM Eastern Time, in accordance with the proclamation issued by President Donald J. Trump, the U.S. Navy and other military forces will begin a blockade against vessels of all nations entering or departing Iranian ports and coastal areas, including all Iranian ports on the Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. CENTCOM additionally states that the blockade will not impede freedom of navigation for vessels transiting to and from Non-Iranian ports via the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）宣布，根据唐纳德·J·特朗普总统发布的公告，自4月13日星期一美国东部时间上午10:00起，美国海军和其他军事力量将开始对所有进入或离开伊朗港口和沿海地区的国家的船只实施封锁，包括波斯湾和阿曼湾的所有伊朗港口。中央司令部还表示，封锁不会妨碍通过霍尔木兹海峡往返非伊朗港口的船只的航行自由。 推文

text: The Spectator Index UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer and French President Emmanuel Macron say ceasefire should include Lebanon. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043435060851052947/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 英国首相基尔·斯塔默和法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，停火协议应包括黎巴嫩。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043435060851052947/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command forces announced that they will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering or exiting Iranian ports on 13 April at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran has currently a dozen tankers in the Gulf of Oman holding about 23 million barrels of crude oil. They will likely be the first target of the US Navy. They could also seek refuge in friendly waters such as in Pakistan territorial waters and thus escape the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国中央司令部部队宣布，他们将于4月13日美国东部时间上午10:00开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的航运交通。封锁将公正地针对所有进入或离开伊朗港口的国家的船只实施……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗目前在阿曼湾有十几艘油轮，装载着约2300万桶原油。它们很可能成为美国海军的首要目标。它们也可能寻求在友好水域（如巴基斯坦领海）避难，从而逃避封锁。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar: We will renew and put on a strong foundation—and if possible, expand—the cooperation of the Visegrád Four. In this spirit, my first trip will be to Poland, to strengthen the thousand-year-old Polish-Hungarian friendship. My second trip will lead to Vienna, and the third to Brussels, so that we can bring home the EU funds that the Hungarian people are entitled to.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们将更新并夯实维谢格拉德集团的合作基础——并尽可能扩大合作。本着这种精神，我的第一次出访将前往波兰，以加强千年波匈友谊。我的第二次出访将前往维也纳，第三次前往布鲁塞尔，以便我们能带回匈牙利人民应得的欧盟资金。

text: Péter Magyar: Hungary will again be a strong ally in the European Union and NATO.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：匈牙利将再次成为欧盟和北约内部强大的盟友。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 The ceasefire between Russian and Ukrainian forces has officialy started. If everything goes as expected, fighting will continue until the end of the ceasefire on April 13. The fighting will then continue. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The Easter truce between Russia and Ukraine has officially ended. Clashes, FPV attacks have mostly ceased during the weekend with some exceptions. No glide bombs or drone were launched. This evening the launch of drones has already resumed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰军队之间的停火协议已正式开始。如果一切按预期进行，战斗将持续到4月13日停火结束。之后战斗将继续。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的复活节休战已正式结束。周末期间，除少数例外，冲突和FPV攻击基本停止。没有发射滑翔炸弹或无人机。今晚无人机发射已经恢复。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 JD Vance does the walk of shame after failed talks in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 JD·万斯在伊斯兰堡会谈失败后进行了“羞耻之旅”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚠️ 🇮🇷 BREAKING: The United States will blockade all ships entering or exiting Iranian ports beginning tomorrow, April 13 at 10am ET per CENTCOM. 🔸 Applies to vessels of ALL nations, including China, Russia, India 🔸 Covers all Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman 🔸 CENTCOM says it will not impede transit through Hormuz to non-Iranian ports 🔸 Mariners ordered to monitor Notice to Mariners broadcasts and contact US naval forces on channel 16 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚠️ 🇮🇷 突发：根据中央司令部的消息，美国将于明天4月13日美国东部时间上午10点开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的船只。 🔸 适用于所有国家的船只，包括中国、俄罗斯、印度 🔸 涵盖阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾的所有伊朗港口 🔸 中央司令部表示，不会妨碍通过霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的过境 🔸 命令海员监控海员通知广播，并在16频道与美国海军部队联系 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: Our country wants to live again. It wants to be a European country again. Crowd chants: "Russians go home!"
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们的国家想要再次生活。它想再次成为一个欧洲国家。人群高呼：“俄罗斯人回家！”

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament, on control of the Strait of Hormuz: "If they had realized we would achieve such a position and take control of the Strait of Hormuz, perhaps they would have been more cautious in going to war with us." Now not…" 🇮🇷 "It must be accepted that now the world has four superpowers. One of the superpowers is the Islamic Republic." Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament: America caused Iran to become an international power sooner than America thought. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊谈霍尔木兹海峡的控制权：‘如果他们意识到我们会达到这样的地位并控制霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们在与我们开战时会更谨慎。’ 现在不是……” 🇮🇷 “必须承认，现在世界有四个超级大国。其中一个超级大国是伊斯兰共和国。” 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊：美国促使伊朗比美国想象的更早成为国际大国。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: NOW: Péter Magyar: TISZA not only won this election, but every sign points towards having a strong two-thirds majority in the new National Assembly.
text_zh: 现在：彼得·马扎尔：TISZA党不仅赢得了这次选举，而且所有迹象都表明在新国民议会中拥有强大的三分之二多数席位。

text: NEW: Regional countries are racing to bring the U.S. and Iran back to the negotiating table after marathon peace talks in Islamabad ended without a deal. Despite defiant statements from the U.S. and Iran the door remains open for further diplomacy and a second round of talks could be held within days. Regional countries were also in consultation with the U.S. to secure an extension of two-week ceasefire. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 最新：在伊斯兰堡的马拉松式和平谈判以无协议告终后，地区国家正竞相将美国和伊朗拉回谈判桌。尽管美国和伊朗发表了挑衅性声明，但外交大门依然敞开，第二轮会谈可能在几天内举行。地区国家也在与美国磋商，以确保延长两周的停火。来源：华尔街日报

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command forces announced that they will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering or exiting Iranian ports on 13 April at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or departing Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. CENTCOM will not impede vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non‑Iranian ports. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部部队宣布，他们将于4月13日美国东部时间上午10:00开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的航运交通。封锁将公正地针对所有进入或离开阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾伊朗港口的国家的船只实施。中央司令部不会妨碍通过霍尔木兹海峡往返非伊朗港口的船只。 @wfwitness

text: BREAKING: CENTCOM says the U.S. will begin a naval blockade of all ships entering or leaving Iranian ports on April 13 at 10 a.m. ET. The blockade applies to vessels of all nations but will not affect ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz to non-Iranian ports. Mariners are advised to follow official notices and maintain communication with U.S. naval forces in the region.
text_zh: 突发：中央司令部表示，美国将于4月13日美国东部时间上午10点开始对所有进出伊朗港口的船只实施海军封锁。封锁适用于所有国家的船只，但不会影响通过霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的船只。建议海员遵循官方通知并与该地区的美国海军部队保持联系。

text: Zelensky: I congratulate Peter Magyar and the TISZA party on their convincing victory. It’s important when a constructive approach wins. Ukraine has always strived for good-neighborly relations with everyone in Europe, and we are ready to develop cooperation with Hungary. We are ready for meetings and joint constructive work for the benefit of both peoples, as well as for peace, security, and stability in Europe.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我祝贺彼得·马扎尔和TISZA党取得令人信服的胜利。当建设性的方法获胜时，这很重要。乌克兰一直致力于与欧洲所有国家建立睦邻友好关系，我们准备发展与匈牙利的合作。我们准备为两国人民的利益，以及为欧洲的和平、安全与稳定进行会晤和共同建设性工作。

text: NOW: Péter Magyar: Together we have replaced the Orbán regime, together we have liberated Hungary, we have taken back our homeland.
text_zh: 现在：彼得·马扎尔：我们共同取代了欧尔班政权，我们共同解放了匈牙利，我们夺回了我们的家园。

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on X. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫在X上发文。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: After recent losses and damage to its aerial refueling fleet during operations linked to the Iran conflict, the U.S. Air Force has reactivated retired KC-135 tanker aircraft from storage. This includes a 68-year-old Stratotanker built in 1958, now undergoing maintenance for possible return to service. Source: Bild
text_zh: 在与伊朗冲突相关的行动中，美国空军的空中加油机队遭受损失和损坏后，美国空军已从封存状态中重新启用了退役的KC-135加油机。其中包括一架1958年制造的68岁高龄的同温层加油机，目前正在进行维护，以便可能重返服役。来源：图片报

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 ⚡ Trump had invested significant efforts in recent weeks to promote Orbán. Even last week, Trump sent his Vice President, J.D. Vance, to Hungary to express further strong public support for Orbán. Vance promised investments and economic support but Hungarians didn't buy those promises.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 ⚡ 特朗普在过去几周投入了大量精力来支持欧尔班。就在上周，特朗普还派遣了他的副总统JD·万斯前往匈牙利，以表达对欧尔班进一步强有力的公开支持。万斯承诺了投资和经济支持，但匈牙利人并不买账。

text: Apple Maps appears to have removed the names of all villages in southern Lebanon. This is the exact area Israel is currently trying to occupy.
text_zh: 苹果地图似乎删除了黎巴嫩南部所有村庄的名称。这正是以色列目前试图占领的区域。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Enjoy the current pump figures. With the so-called 'blockade'. Soon you'll be nostalgic for $4–$5 gas.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：享受当前的油价吧。随着所谓的“封锁”，很快你们就会怀念4到5美元的汽油了。

text: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Union, celebrates Orban’s defeat in Hungary:
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩庆祝欧尔班在匈牙利落败：

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇭🇺 Orbán acknowledged his party’s defeat in the Hungarian parliamentary elections. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 DD Geopolitics：🇭🇺 欧尔班承认其政党在匈牙利议会选举中失败。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸: 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 I spoke with Irishman and SMO veteran Aiden Minnis, recipient of the Medal of Suvorov for courage, to ask him how he felt about going back to the front after spending nearly two weeks in Moscow on vacation for the first time in 15 months. Here are his thoughts. Victory is ours, comrade! 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 Follow me Christopher Helali, on YouTube , X, Instagram, and TikTok
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸：🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 我采访了爱尔兰人、特别军事行动老兵、苏沃洛夫勋章获得者艾登·明尼斯（Aiden Minnis），询问他在莫斯科度假近两周后，15个月来第一次回到前线是什么感觉。以下是他的想法。胜利属于我们，同志！ 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 在YouTube、X、Instagram和TikTok上关注我 Christopher Helali

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron: I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 More European leaders congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory over Viktor Orbán. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向民主参与的胜利、匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的依恋致敬……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 更多欧洲领导人祝贺彼得·马扎尔在选举中战胜维克多·欧尔班。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban reassured Hungarians from the opposition. "But no matter how it turned out, we from the opposition will serve our country and the Hungarian nation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认在议会选举中失败。‘亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然还不完整，但可以理解且清晰，选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予责任和……’” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班向反对派中的匈牙利人保证。‘但无论结果如何，我们作为反对派将服务于我们的国家和匈牙利民族。’ @wfwitness

text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found.
text_zh: 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安：如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。
